---
title: "Tanmayee Kodali"
---

```{=html}
<div class="profile-section">
  <div class="profile-avatar"><img src="photo.jpg" alt="Tanmayee Kodali" width="120" height="120"></div>
  <div class="profile-info">
    <h1>Tanmayee Kodali</h1>
    <p class="tagline">MPH in Global Health &middot; Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University (Class of 2026)</p>
    <p>Public health professional with 5+ years of experience analyzing population health challenges and developing evidence-based strategies to address them. Proven expertise in program evaluation, technical assistance delivery, and multi-stakeholder collaboration across government, philanthropy, and research settings. Skilled in data analysis, training development, and translating research into actionable interventions that strengthen public health systems.</p>
    <p>I am motivated by the belief that many of the world's hardest health problems already have solutions somewhere, in evidence, in practice, or in communities. Global health is about connecting those solutions across people, places, and systems so that progress in one setting can strengthen health everywhere.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Areas of Expertise

```{=html}
<div class="highlights-grid">
  <div class="highlight-card">
    <div class="card-icon"><i class="fas fa-globe-americas"></i></div>
    <h4>Global Health</h4>
    <p>Maternal &amp; child health, health systems strengthening, equity-focused interventions in LMICs</p>
  </div>
  <div class="highlight-card">
    <div class="card-icon"><i class="fas fa-chart-line"></i></div>
    <h4>Data &amp; Analytics</h4>
    <p>R, Python, SAS, REDCap, Tableau, Power BI; statistical modeling &amp; visualization</p>
  </div>
  <div class="highlight-card">
    <div class="card-icon"><i class="fas fa-cloud-sun-rain"></i></div>
    <h4>Climate &amp; Health</h4>
    <p>Climate adaptation modeling, cost-effectiveness analysis, CMIP6 projections</p>
  </div>
  <div class="highlight-card">
    <div class="card-icon"><i class="fas fa-search"></i></div>
    <h4>Research &amp; Policy</h4>
    <p>Implementation science (RE-AIM, CFIR), systematic reviews, policy briefs, M&amp;E</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Recent Highlights

- **Publication under review** &mdash; *A Systematic Review of Interventions to Increase Uptake of Lung Cancer Screening in the United States* (Escoffrey et al., 2026)
- **Conference presentation** &mdash; Lung Cancer Screening Survey among Georgia Healthcare Providers, *Conference on the Science of Dissemination &amp; Implementation in Health*, December 2025
- **Certificates** &mdash; Data Science &amp; Climate Change and Health, Rollins School of Public Health
- **GPA 3.96/4.00** &mdash; Recognition Award by Chief Minister of Bihar (2022&ndash;23); Best Performer Award, Government of Bihar (2023)

---

## Get in Touch

```{=html}
<div style="background:#e8f4f5; border-left:4px solid #0f6b72; border-radius:0 8px 8px 0; padding:1.2rem 1.8rem; display:inline-block; margin-top:0.5rem;">
  <p style="margin:0 0 0.5rem; font-weight:600; color:#1a2e35; font-size:1rem;">Connect with me</p>
  <p style="margin:0; font-size:0.97rem; color:#3a4a4e;">
    <i class="fab fa-github"></i> <a href="https://github.com/TanmayeeKodali" target="_blank">github.com/TanmayeeKodali</a>
    &nbsp;&nbsp;&middot;&nbsp;&nbsp;
    <i class="fab fa-linkedin-in"></i> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/tanmayeekodali/" target="_blank">linkedin.com/in/tanmayeekodali</a>
  </p>
</div>
```
